windows.embed_text_v2: Finished labelled wick-test candles displayed on a granite counter; coloured frosted-glass tumblers with handwritten test, wick, wax and fragrance labels.
windows.summary_v2: Camera surveys a lineup of finished, labelled coloured frosted-glass wick-test candles arranged on a granite counter.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: handwritten test labels Test# Wick Wax Fragrance LX 18 4627

seconds_v2.desc: Two finished frosted-glass container candles sit side by side on a brown speckled granite countertop, each with a handwritten test label (Test #, Wick, Wax, Fragrance).
Camera pans/cuts to a white and a peach frosted-glass test candle, labels facing forward.
Closer view of the same white and peach candles, handwritten labels readable (LX 18, 4627; LX 20, 4627).
Camera centres on the peach candle alone, with the white one partly off-frame at left.
Pan continues across the peach candle and an adjacent white test candle, granite counter dominant.
A single white frosted-glass test candle is centred, labelled and unlit.
Now a green test candle is shown at left, a smaller cream candle centre — all labelled.
Centre on a teal/green frosted test candle, label visible at front.
Cut to a pink test candle with cream and pale neighbour candles, again with labels — display of multiple finished colour-coded wick-test candles.

windows.embed_text_v2: Finished labeled jar candles in frosted pink green and white glass burning with lit flames on a granite counter beside a smartphone, product display footage
windows.summary_v2: A panning showcase of several finished, labeled jar candles in colored frosted glass, shown unlit then lit and burning on a granite counter beside a phone.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: product labels on jars; phone lock screen 12:28 Sunday April 18

seconds_v2.desc: Two finished candles in frosted glass jars, a green one and a pink one, sit unlit on a brown granite counter with product labels on the front.
Close view of the labeled green and pink jar candles, wax set with single wicks, resting on the granite.
The pale green jar candle is shown up close with its blank product label, beside the pink one.
The camera pans to a smartphone lying on the counter showing a beach lock-screen reading 12:28, Sunday April 18.
The dark phone screen and counter dominate the frame as a glowing lit candle appears at the right edge.
A lit candle in a frosted jar glows brightly beside the phone on the granite surface.
Two finished candles, green and pink, now burn with bright flames, labels visible, phone at left.
Three lit jar candles, green, pink and another, burn in a row along the granite counter.
A row of finished lit candles in pink, green and white frosted jars glow on the granite counter, all labeled.

windows.embed_text_v2: Burn test of finished labelled coloured frosted-glass wick-test candles lit on a granite counter, iPhone alongside used as a timer; warm flames, handwritten test labels.
windows.summary_v2: Pan across labelled finished frosted-glass test candles burning during a wick burn test, with a phone clock used as timer.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: phone lock screen 1:45 1:46; handwritten labels on candles

seconds_v2.desc: Three labelled frosted-glass test candles (pink, green, cream) burn side by side on a brown granite counter; warm flames lit.
Pan to the next two lit test candles (green and cream) — flames steady; labels visible.
Continued pan over a cream and a peach lit test candle, both burning.
Three test candles in row — cream/white, cream/grey, peach — all lit with flames; labels facing forward.
An iPhone lying flat on the counter shows the lock screen 1:45, beside a single lit cream candle — phone used as a timer for the burn test.
Phone now reads 1:46 next to the cream lit candle; small flame burning.
Wider view: the phone 1:46 at left, a cream lit test candle centre, peach candle entering at right.
Two lit candles in the foreground (cream/green and red/cream) — wick test burn in progress.
Cream-green and red labelled test candles, both burning, fill the frame on the granite counter.

windows.embed_text_v2: Finished labeled jar candles in frosted green pink teal white glass with burnt wicks and handwritten wick-test labels on a granite counter, product showcase footage, smoke from blown-out wick
windows.summary_v2: A slow pan across a row of finished, recently-extinguished jar candles in green, pink, teal and white frosted glass, each marked with a handwritten wick-test label on a granite counter.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: handwritten jar labels: Type, Wick, Wax, Fragrance (CD5, CD16, LX16)

seconds_v2.desc: A finished pale-green jar candle with a burnt curled wick sits on a granite counter, a handwritten test label on its front reading type, wick, wax, fragrance.
Close view of the labeled green jar candle, wick recently extinguished, beside a phone edge and a pink candle.
The camera pans across two finished jar candles, green and pink, both labeled, on the granite.
A pink frosted jar candle with a burnt wick and handwritten label is centered beside the green one.
The pink candle is shown up close with its test label, flanked by green and teal candles.
Two finished candles, pink and teal-green, sit side by side with handwritten labels on the counter.
The teal-green jar candle with a burnt wick and label is shown next to the pink one.
The pan continues across teal and white frosted jar candles, smoke rising from a just-blown-out wick.
A white jar candle with a burnt wick and handwritten label reading wick LX 16 sits beside the green one on the granite.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: Thanks for watching! Please subscribe my channel and follow me on social media @STANDLEYHANDCRAFTED

seconds_v2.desc: A dark YouTube end-screen card with red text 'Thanks for watching! Please subscribe' and the handle @STANDLEYHANDCRAFTED, social icons and placeholder boxes.
The same static outro card: red lettering, Instagram, Facebook and Pinterest icons, a circular subscribe placeholder and a video thumbnail box.
Unchanged end-screen graphic with the thank-you and subscribe message and channel handle in red on dark background.
The outro card remains, showing social media icons and the @STANDLEYHANDCRAFTED handle.
Static YouTube end card with subscribe prompt, social icons and empty placeholder rectangles.
The same closing graphic with 'Thanks for watching' text and follow-me social links.
Unchanged end-screen overlay with red text and Instagram, Facebook, Pinterest logos.

Final frame of the static end-screen card with thank-you text, handle and social icons on dark background.
